terms: I acknowledge that SwanyThree facilitates 90% revenue pass-through.
I agree to not stream copyrighted content during Watch Parties.
I understand Guest Destinations require my own platform stream keys.
I accept that this is a beta product and may contain bugs or incomplete features.
I agree to report any issues or security vulnerabilities to the SwanyThree team.
beta_agreement_v1.revenue_policy: Platform retains 10% gross. Processor fees are deducted before net calculation.
beta_agreement_v1.privacy: Camera/Mic access is local-only via WebRTC until 'Go Live' is pressed.
beta_agreement_v1.data_retention: Stream recordings are kept for 30 days unless the creator opts for permanent storage.
beta_limitations: Watch Party supports YouTube, Vimeo, and direct MP4 URLs
Guest Destinations support RTMP-compatible platforms only
